{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":414052,"duration_api_ms":302773,"num_turns":41,"result":"Phase 1 — db-schema 완료. 커밋 `a93ff476`.

**변경 내역**
- `webhard-api/prisma/schema.prisma` — `CompanyFolderAlias` 모델 추가 (LaserOnlyMapping 직후), `Company` 모델에 `folderAliases CompanyFolderAlias[]` 역참조 relation 추가
- `webhard-api/prisma/migrations/20260427030703_add_company_folder_alias/migration.sql` — `company_folder_aliases` 테이블 생성, `(folder_name, company_id)` unique, `folder_name` / `status` index, `onDelete: Cascade` FK
- `tasks/24-external-sync-company-folder/index.json` — phase 1 `completed`

**AC 검증**
- ✅ `npx prisma migrate dev --name add_company_folder_alias` — migration 생성·dev DB 적용
- ✅ `pnpm build` — `nest build` 통과 (`dist/src/main.js` 등 생성)
- ✅ Prisma Client `.d.ts` 에 `CompanyFolderAlias` 타입 노출 확인 (523개 참조)

**참고**
- `prisma generate` 의 query engine `.dll` rename 단계가 Windows EPERM으로 실패했으나 (다른 node 프로세스가 잠금 보유), `.d.ts` 타입 정의는 갱신되어 빌드/타입체크에 문제 없음. 다음 phase에서 `prisma.companyFolderAlias.*` 호출 시 dev 서버 재시작 + `npx prisma generate` 재실행 권장.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"0c10d4bb-c660-41b1-b087-705ed8716a89","total_cost_usd":2.1808375,"usage":{"input_tokens":225,"cache_creation_input_tokens":77176,"cache_read_input_tokens":2330725,"output_tokens":21280,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":77176,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":1182,"cache_read_input_tokens":90911,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1855,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1855},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-7[1m]":{"inputTokens":225,"outputTokens":21280,"cacheReadInputTokens":2330725,"cacheCreationInputTokens":77176,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":2.1808375,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"3d417484-d438-4516-ad07-1e764da7cf68"}
